abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} using the sedative, add +2 and suffer -1 use.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} using the sedative, its chemicals specifically target and bind to the relevant receptors; you may reroll one challenge die.

If you are shaken and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} using the sedative, advanced chemicals detect the neurological impact and act immediately to clear it; take an automatic strong hit, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1).

The sedative remains effective for 24 hours after being consumed. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} during that time, add +1 and choose one after resolving the move.

  • Take +2 momentum
  • Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)
